question: What are the pairs of teachers and students who are in the same class? Give me the pairs of their details.
sql: SELECT Students.student_id, Students.bio_data, Students.student_details, Teachers.teacher_id, Teachers.teacher_details FROM Students JOIN Classes ON Students.student_id = Classes.student_id JOIN Teachers ON Classes.teacher_id = Teachers.teacher_id;

back_translation.intent: 获取学生和教师信息通过班级关联

semantic.reason: 目标表缺少明确的关联逻辑（如通过班级表连接教师和学生），原始问题需要基于班级的配对关系而SQL描述未体现JOIN条件
